restaurant_name: Birria Patro Jaramillo — 3961 Snell Ave, Suite 2, San Jose, CA 95136

menu.name: Birria Taco Dorado Combo Revolcada (3)
menu.description: 3 grilled birria tacos with charred onions, cheese, cilantro, salsa. Includes 8oz consomé.

menu.name: Birria Tacos Dorados Combo Normal (3)
menu.description: 3 classic birria tacos with cheese, onion, cilantro, salsa. Includes 8oz consomé.

menu.name: Tacos Dorados Carne Asada (3)
menu.description: 3 crispy carne asada tacos with cheese, onion, cilantro, salsa. Tortillas dipped in lamb lard.

menu.name: Taco Suave / Soft Taco
menu.description: Choice of meat, onions, cilantro, salsa.

menu.name: Taco Crispy / Crispy Taco
menu.description: Choice of meat, onions, cilantro, salsa, in a crispy shell.

menu.name: Plato Birria Normal / Normal Birria Plate
menu.description: Steamed birria plate. Includes 12oz consomé, 5 tortillas, onions, cilantro.

menu.name: Plato Birria Revolcada / Grilled Lamb Plate
menu.description: Grilled birria plate with charred onions. Includes 12oz consomé, 5 tortillas, onions, cilantro.

menu.name: Libra Normal (1lb) / Normal Pound
menu.description: 1 lb steamed birria. Includes 32oz consomé, 10 tortillas, onions, cilantro on the side.

menu.name: Libra Revolcada / Grilled Lamb Per Pound
menu.description: 1 lb grilled birria with charred onions. Includes 32oz broth, 10 tortillas.

menu.name: Consomé (Small)
menu.description: Rich birria broth, served hot.

menu.name: Consomé (Large, 32oz)
menu.description: More broth than meat, plus rice and 4 tortillas.

menu.name: Super Burrito / Super Burrito
menu.description: Choice of meat, rice, whole beans, guacamole, cheese, sour cream, pico de gallo.

menu.name: Burrito Regular / Regular Burrito
menu.description: Choice of meat, rice, whole beans, onions, cilantro, salsa.

menu.name: Burrito Vegetariano / Vegetarian Burrito
menu.description: Rice, whole beans, sour cream, cheese, guacamole, lettuce, pico de gallo.

menu.name: Quesabirria (3)
menu.description: 3 birria quesadillas, melted cheese, served with consomé for dipping.

menu.name: Quesadilla Regular
menu.description: Choice of meat, cheese, onions, cilantro, salsa.

menu.name: Tostada
menu.description: Choice of meat, beans, cheese, crema, lettuce, pico de gallo, avocado.

menu.name: Nachos
menu.description: Crispy tortilla chips loaded with cheese, choice of meat, and all the fixings.

menu.name: Nachos Fries / Fries Nachos
menu.description: Crispy fries loaded with cheese, choice of meat, and all the fixings.

menu.name: Ceviche de Camarón / Shrimp Ceviche
menu.description: Fresh shrimp ceviche, citrus-cured with pico de gallo.

menu.name: Shrimp Burrito
menu.description: Flour coated deep fried shrimp, red cabbage, pico de gallo, cucumber, house dressing, whole beans, rice, cheese, avocado.

menu.name: Huevos con Chorizo / Eggs & Chorizo
menu.description: Served with rice, beans, chorizo, tortillas, and eggs.

menu.name: Desayuno con Huevos / Breakfast with Eggs
menu.description: Served with 2 eggs, rice, and beans.

menu.name: Menudo
menu.description: Traditional Mexican soup made with cow's stomach in broth with red chili pepper base. Weekends only.

menu.name: The Full Patro Experience (Party Pack)
menu.description: 4 handmade tortillas, birria normal, birria revolcada, flour quesadilla, 3 quesabirrias with cheese, 2 medium consomés. PRICE PENDING — manager has not confirmed yet.

menu.name: Birria Pizza
menu.description: 6 generous slices, perfect for two. Comes with 2 small consomés for dipping, onion, cilantro, fresh limes. PRICE PENDING — manager has not confirmed yet.

menu.name: Arroz / Rice
menu.description: Mexican-style rice.

menu.name: Frijoles / Beans
menu.description: Whole or refried beans.

menu.name: Guacamole
menu.description: Fresh house-made guacamole.

menu.name: Chips y Salsa
menu.description: Crispy tortilla chips with fresh salsa. PRICE PENDING — manager has not confirmed yet.

menu.name: Extra Consomé 8oz
menu.description: Extra cup of rich birria broth.

menu.name: Extra Tortillas (5)
menu.description: 5 additional tortillas.

menu.name: Avocado
menu.description: Fresh sliced avocado.

menu.name: Kids Bean and Cheese Burrito
menu.description: Bean and cheese burrito, comes with fries.

menu.name: Kids Taco
menu.description: Choice of meat, simple and mild.

menu.name: Kids Quesadilla
menu.description: Melted cheese quesadilla.

menu.name: Flan
menu.description: Rich, creamy flan — customers say it tastes "almost like crème brûlée."

menu.name: Horchata Grande / Large Horchata
menu.description: House-made horchata, large size.

menu.name: Horchata Regular
menu.description: House-made horchata, regular size.

menu.name: Agua Fresca
menu.description: Refreshing fruit water, ask for today's flavor.

menu.name: Jarritos
menu.description: Assorted flavors, Mexican bottled soda.
